opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I scratched this rough scab on my head earlier, and now it is pouring blood and throbbing with a deep, constant ache.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump on the top of my bald head has been getting bigger for weeks, and two hours ago the crust came off when I scratched it and it started bleeding a lot and hurting badly. I live alone and I can't see the top of my head or press on it properly to stop it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the lump started as a rough patch about 6 weeks ago and grew quickly; the bleeding and the throbbing pain started about 2 hours ago after I scratched it
symptom_narrative.duration: the lump about 6 weeks; the bleeding and severe pain about 2 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a firm, raised, rough, crusty lump on the top of my bald scalp; now the middle is raw and bleeding and there is a deep, constant throbbing ache
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bleeding soaked a towel and the pain is a deep constant throb that won't ease
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the top (crown) of my bald head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the lump has been there and growing for weeks; the bleeding and throbbing have been constant since I scratched it two hours ago
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — I've been holding a towel to it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: touching or scratching it makes it bleed and hurt more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the bleeding and the throbbing pain; I feel a bit frustrated and anxious about the bleeding
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous episodes like this; I've had a lot of sun on my bald head over the years and some rough sun spots
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing at home but I'm anxious, and I can't reach or see the top of my own head to deal with it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lots of sun exposure over the years on a bald scalp, with some rough sun-damage spots on my head

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and independent; unable to properly see or apply firm pressure to the top of the scalp

objective_data_offered.value: a firm raised lump about the size of a large coin on the top of my bald head, with a thick rough crusty edge and a raw bleeding centre
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-taken phone photo of the top of their own head; angle and focus may be poor and the patient cannot easily view the site directly

objective_data_offered.value: it's bleeding from the middle of the lump and I've soaked a towel holding pressure
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported blood loss; volume estimated from a stained towel, not measured

objective_data_offered.value: a deep constant throbbing ache at the lump that started when it began bleeding
a heavily blood-stained towel being held against the top of the head
